title: tribulus terrestris var. terrestris
intro: Tribulus terrestris var. terrestris, also known as puncture vine, is a type of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tribulus terrestris var. terrestris include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced male fertility, and potential weight loss, as well as improved immune function and reduced stress levels. Tribulus terrestris var. terrestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as capsules, tablets, and teas, allowing for convenient consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
